name: autoform
description: Turn any AI coding assistant into a Lean 4 formalization agent.

interface.shortDescription: Lean 4 autoformalization workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: AutoForm Bot packages the Fort autoformalization workflow as agent skills, slash commands, hooks, and MCP tool servers for Lean 4 and Mathlib projects.
defaultPrompt: Help me formalize this theorem in Lean 4.
Review this Lean formalization against the source statement.
Extract formalization targets from this mathematical text.
